# Al Baraka Diyar Project Support FZE LLC

> UAE-based industrial project support company providing comprehensive solutions for construction, solar, and industrial operations across UAE, Qatar, and KSA since 2011.

## Company Overview
Al Baraka Diyar Project Support FZE LLC is a premier industrial project support solutions provider headquartered in Musaffah Industrial Zone, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. Established in 2011, the company delivers end-to-end project support services across the GCC region including UAE, Qatar, and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

## Core Services
- **Equipment Rental**: Heavy and light equipment rental including excavators, loaders, cranes, boom lifts, forklifts, and compactors for construction and industrial projects.
- **Heavy Transport & Logistics**: Specialized heavy-duty transport solutions with low-bed trailers, flatbed trucks, and escort vehicles for oversized cargo movement.
- **General Transport**: Fleet management covering site buses, pickup trucks, water tankers, and fuel tankers for daily site operations.
- **Manpower Supply**: Skilled and semi-skilled labor supply including site engineers, supervisors, welders, electricians, riggers, scaffolders, and general laborers.
- **Porta Cabin Solutions**: Modular portable cabin manufacturing and rental for site offices, accommodation, mess halls, and ablution units.
- **Material Trading**: Industrial material procurement and supply including steel, cement, aggregates, pipes, fittings, and construction consumables.
- **Site Support Packages**: Comprehensive site mobilization and demobilization packages combining multiple services for turnkey project support.

## Key Statistics
- 1200+ Projects Completed
- 850+ Clients Served  
- 500+ Asset Fleet
- 15+ Years of Experience
- Operations across 3 GCC Countries

## Industries Served
- Oil & Gas
- Construction & Infrastructure
- Solar Energy & Renewable Power
- Industrial Manufacturing
- Civil Engineering
- Marine & Offshore

- [Project Support](https://albarakadiyar.com/support.html): Site mobilization, manpower deployment, porta cabin infrastructure, and civil support details.
